context.instructions: READ ai-rules/MASTER.md from the repo root before writing any UI code. This project has strict design rules: no soft gradients, no glassmorphism, no oversized radii, no pill buttons, no 3-column equal feature cards, no Inter as default font, no em-dashes, no pure black/white. Think Linear, Raycast, Stripe, GitHub. Mobile-first CSS. Currency: ₦ only. Accent: #6C47FF.
